---
id: create-chat-message
title: "Send a chat message"
description: "`content` and `attachmentUrl` are both optional but at least one is"
sidebar_label: "Send a chat message"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send a chat message"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/chat/groups/{groupId}/messages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



`content` and `attachmentUrl` are both optional but at least one is
required. `attachmentUrl` must be a path returned by the upload
endpoint (`/uploads/...`); arbitrary URLs are rejected. `replyToMessageId`
is optional and must reference an existing message in the same group.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
